execution_run.what happened: Implemented #1404 by making the installed adapter, fallback workflow, startup defaults, Planning bootstrap payloads, generated payload mirrors, and maintainer-surface checker describe Startup Router as the ordinary front door. Also tightened start next_safe_action read-only allowances and fixed dogfooded selector access for next_safe_action/action_signals.
